# Kbd

A keyboard shortcut display component that renders keyboard keys with a styled `<kbd>` element. Used to indicate keyboard input or shortcuts to the user.

## Import

```jsx
import { Kbd } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the keyboard key display |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Kbd>Shift</Kbd>
```

### Keyboard shortcut combination

```jsx
<Text>
  Press <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd> + <Kbd>C</Kbd> to copy
</Text>
```

### Multi-key shortcuts

```jsx
<Text>
  Save with <Kbd>Cmd</Kbd> + <Kbd>S</Kbd>
</Text>

<Text>
  Undo with <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd> + <Kbd>Z</Kbd>
</Text>
```

### Different sizes

```jsx
<Kbd size="sm">Enter</Kbd>
<Kbd size="md">Enter</Kbd>
<Kbd size="lg">Enter</Kbd>
```

## Features

- Renders a styled `<kbd>` HTML element
- Visually distinguishes keyboard keys from surrounding text
- Supports multiple sizes
- Commonly used in documentation, tooltips, and shortcut hints
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
